item.action: Add stale-lock lease recovery for trusted-root persistence without permitting stale owners to delete successor locks.

progress.finding: Time-bounded lock ownership plus atomic stale-lock quarantine restores progress after a crashed writer; token-checked release prevents an expired owner from deleting a successor. Missing or malformed ownership state is not safely distinguishable from an interrupted acquisition and therefore fails closed.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed; committed module fetched back from main at blob 2357dd56a5492b8510b6358736051791984537e8
progress.trust_limit: The lease provides single-host writer recovery only. It does not establish distributed consensus, network-filesystem safety, clock correctness, or authorization of trusted-root metadata.

item.handoff: R-020 should add true child-process fault injection at acquisition, owner-record write, quarantine rename, root rename, and release boundaries, then define a supported-filesystem matrix and a monotonic-clock strategy.
